synopsis: "Repel All Boarders!" is a short comic story published in Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.18. It follows the events of a battle between Ahsoka Tano, Obi-Wan Kenobi and the 38th Armored Division versus their Separatist pursuers after a battle lost by the Republic Navy. It was later published in Star Wars: The Clone Wars Magazine 5 as well.
title: Repel All Boarders!
